title: lysimachia prolifera
intro: Lysimachia prolifera, also known as creeping Jenny or moneywort, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its golden-yellow foliage and trailing stems. The medicinal properties of Lysimachia prolifera include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Lysimachia prolifera can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like eczema, acne, and wounds.
